abilities.description: Choose target enchantment you control that doesn't have the same name as another permanent you control. Create a token that's a copy of it, except it isn't legendary. If the token is an Aura, untap CARDNAME, then scry 2. Activate only as a sorcery.

effect.description: Choose target enchantment you control that doesn't have the same name as another permanent you control. Create a token that's a copy of it, except it isn't legendary. If the token is an Aura, untap CARDNAME, then scry 2. Activate only as a sorcery.
effect.name: CopyPermanent

abilities.target_prompt: Choose target enchantment you control that doesn't have the same name as another permanent you control.
